other_observers: David Waltman, Peter Gent, Tom Thomson, Joanie Kleypas; David Waltman
description: Moderately sized passerine (about 8 inches in length) with conical emberizine (sparrow-like) bill. Bright chocolate brown head, upper chest, and upperparts, with faint blackish streaking on back (suggestive of retained juvenal feathers). Bright brick-orange sides. Otherwise white below.Behaviors: Perched on ground eating seeds, or perched in a low woody shrub or brush pile.Call: NonePlumage: Hatch Year
